title: Hypervault - Rugged
relevance_summary: Internal ledger system with no share tokens, privileged admin functions, and fake audit claims

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of funds to a single wallet without prior token issuance.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of funds to a single wallet without prior token issuance.
summary: HyperVault used an internal ledger system without share tokens and exploited privileged admin functions to siphon funds. A guard could have detected and blocked large fund transfers to a single wallet without prior token issuance.
